calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Noel Gantley.
Dept: 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

West Imboden, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank, N.A.
Martin Kokoska, Assistant Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Noel Gantley.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on January 22, 2019.
Defendant Noel Gantley's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 20, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on August 23, 2019, setting trial for today, January 27, 2020.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff Citibank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Monthly credit card statements from 5/4/14 through 10/8/2018...............ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank, N.A., and against defendant Noel Gantley, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $13,255.80.
Costs - $435.00.

Total - $13,690.80.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Set For Trial On Jan-27-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
